title: Amarite Katana
body:
# Amarite Katana
Amarite longswords can be boring, (somethimes). they're just another sword texture, sure they have a clean visual functionality, but it gets old, fast.

This pack is one of a few packs trying to fix that!
When this pack is enabled, all amarite swords will be re-shaped (and re-named!) into giant katanas, complete with colour changing amarite, netherite, and handles.
Even the amarite borders are bolder, and brighter!
This particular texture for the amarite longsword is even the same size as the classic, and has compatability with the amarite-arsenal compat datapack/mod and pack.

Remember to check out my other projects!
(See my profile.)

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
